content.text:
Based on my analysis of the molecule from multiple viewing angles, I can now clearly identify all neighbour atoms of atom index 50.

## Results

**Target Atom:** Index 50 (C - Carbon)

**Neighbour Atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 42 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 47 | O (Oxygen) |
| 48 | C (Carbon) |
| 52 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 7890

Atom 50 (carbon) has 4 covalently connected neighbour atoms: one nitrogen (N:42), one oxygen (O:47), one carbon (C:48), and one hydrogen (H:52). This is consistent with carbon's typical tetravalent bonding pattern.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 50, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
